reviews.review_description:
Loved this app on my MQ3 until this month when USB OTG fails to recognize drives that were performing flawlessly on 4XVR + MQ3 until recently. 
Does not recognize my 5TB drives anymore.
Have reached the support team for answers. Will update to 5* once they resolve.

developer_response.body:
We appreciate your feedback. Could you confirm if your Meta OS has been updated to v2.4? If you have installed this version, the issue can only be resolved with a future update released by Meta.

Please first verify if the File Explorer application can detect and read your USB device. If file access works properly, please submit the following details for our troubleshooting:
1.Current versions of Meta OS and 4XVR
2.Total capacity and occupied space of your exFAT-formatted USB device
3.Changes or differences compared to your last successful USB access
4.All error messages displayed

We look forward to hearing from you.

reviews.review_description: The app is basically bricked because you can't use the OTG anymore after quest update...whether meta is purposely blocking external HD or not, you can't market this as OTG compatible and charge a premium price. Paid $30 for this now useless app.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your detailed feedback. This problem is caused by a known Meta system upgrade bug we’ve identified. Please update your Quest 2 firmware to version 2.5 first.

If the issue remains after updating, kindly send us further details including your USB specifications, available storage, relevant screenshots or screen recordings. We’ll help resolve it promptly.

reviews.review_description:
My meta quest 3 v2.4 but the usb otg cant read the hard desk which was working fine before, to open the hard desk you have to explore it through a message appear through meta when you insert it , then if you run the aplication alll videos in the hard desk will  desplayed in the local folder ,,,withoutmy created folders which crazy,  how it come!!!? ,, you find mor than 10000 videos in the same area (to find the wanted video yo maybe take more than 1 hhour)
, realy i'm in very bad mood, you have to fix this essential bug, i need to see my folders when i open the hard desk through your aplucation as it was brfore.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your detailed feedback. This problem is caused by a known Meta system upgrade bug we’ve identified. Please update your Quest 2 firmware to version 2.5 first.

If the issue remains after updating, kindly send us further details including your USB specifications, available storage, relevant screenshots or screen recordings. We’ll help resolve it promptly.

reviews.review_description: Overall, it's an excellent player and I really enjoy using it. However, the option to delete files and folders is currently missing. Dear developers, please add a delete function. I would also like to be able to specify a direct path to a network folder, such as "ip/folder/folder".

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback. The deletion feature is on our roadmap and we'll consider the direct path feature in the future.

reviews.review_description: Unless money isn’t a factor try other options first , I bought this after I got my device and I have not used it to watch a complete movie even once ,others are cheaper and better ! So imagine $30 for an app I don’t use !!! It’s frustrating but what can I say lol I messed up , i finally deleted it so at least I can forget

developer_response.body: Hi there, did you run into any troubles or problems while you were using our service? Feel free to tell us all the specific relevant details in detail. In this way, we can quickly figure out proper solutions to fix all these problems smoothly, so you can watch and enjoy your favorite videos without any disturbance at all. You can reach out to us anytime via our official email address contact@4xvr.net, and we will always be ready to offer you sincere and timely help whenever you need it.

reviews.review_description: Good player and supports 3d iso and mkv files.  It is a bit expensive though.  I would like to see the zoom and grab functions only work when pointed at the screen.  Every time I grab my controllers in the void the screen goes flying around and zooms in because I tapped the joystick and pressed the grab button on accident. Have to be real careful picking up the controllers.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We'll improve the feature in future updates.

reviews.review_description: One of the best players, but for $30 I expect it to have the features Bigscreen Beta has (which is free) such as inviting friends to watch with me, a wee bit more environments (although I mainly use void), the ability to pull in Youtube, Pluo TV, or any other video source I want without the need to stream from my computer.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback. We'll keep improving our app to meet your needs.

reviews.review_description:
The quality is unmatched in terms of video clarity, but the 4X Link software (which lets you stream from PC) is very finicky. Most movies load and stream great! But some break the whole thing and cause a blinking load loop that prevents you from accessing any movie! 

When you have lots of movies, it's a real pain trying to guess which one is causing the problems. I've ruled out special characters in the title or length of title and the codecs and formats are the same for other movies that do work. Truly baffling. 

Skybox streams all the same video files with no issue, so I'm going back to them unless this gets resolved.

Response to dev: I did break my collection into smaller folders, but I'm adding new files all the time and this causes big problems for my workflow. I cannot see which file doesn't have a thumbnail because the entire interface just blinks. I cannot click on anything or see anything while attempting the 4X Link. I will be refunding.

developer_response.body: We take your feedback extremely seriously. We are currently working on a major update to the 4X Link workflow, and a completely new version will be released in approximately 1–2 months. We hope you can give it another try then. Thank you for your understanding and support.

reviews.review_description:
This is a great app. I compared this app to Skybox, Pigasus vr, Bigscreen, Deovr, Moonplayer and I must say, the picture clarity is sharper and less faded when your playing a movie in 4XVR.

When playing HDR 4K movies using the hdr adjuster, you will definitely noticed the visuals are brighter, shades are darker, colors seem to pop out and the sound will feel surrounded compared to the other players.

When playing 3D movies in 4XVR, I noticed true depth perception, high-resolution, full-brightness images to each eye without ghosting compared to the other players.

I would like to rate 5 stars, but there two simple major problems that need to be implemented to make this app feel immersive and worth the $30 price tag.

1. NO TURNING AROUND USING JOYSTICK: 
Not being able to use your joystick to (snap turn) to look behind is a problem. Viewers want to look around instead of having to stand up and turn their whole body around. This is a problem especially for the disabled, elderly and  handicapped viewers. Developers need to fix this.

2. NO CHANGING TO MULTIPLE SEATS: Not being able change to many multiple seats such as being seated on the ground floor level in Max Cinema is a major problem. Some viewers like sitting at the top corner or sides of the theater than just being stuck always in the balcony limited to only Front, Middle or Back seating positions. Developers need to fix this.

If the developers can implement these two, viewers can use their joystick to turn around and enjoy the scenery in the Balloon, Space, and Cinema environments as well as not being confined to 3 seating positions. 

These crucial changes will make the app feel immersive, worth the $30, more people will buy, no more complaining and it won't just feel like another limited, stationary and standard generic player in vr.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We've noted the features and will keep improving our app to meet your needs.

reviews.review_title: Why so stingy with the demo???
reviews.review_description: It seems like a good player but 5 minutes  of viewing/day isn't enough for anyone to be able to evaluate if its visual quality is  worth the steep 35$ asking price. I'm trying to compare it Skybox (which has a really nice beta that has all the same  features as 4XVR). I want to see if the visual quality is large enough for me to buy 4XVR but this stingy demo just won't let me. Developer, if you truly believe that your player I a good product, then you should have a bit more confidence in it and let people actually try it. ,1hr/day for five days, even half an hour is OK.

developer_response.body:
Hi, the trial period lasts for 30 days, during which you can explore playing non-3D media files locally. Additionally, we offer a 5-minute-trial of 3D video playback, as well as access to advanced features such as SMB, USB, and more, each day. 

We hope you can have a fully understanding and experience our features and services, helping you make an informed decision about purchasing our product. 

We are committed to reinvesting all revenue into improving and optimizing the performance of the player to provide you with a better viewing experience. Your support drives us forward, and we will continue to strive to bring you better service and products. Thank you for your understanding and support!

If you have further questions or suggestions, please reach out to us via email contact@4xvr.net. We're here to help!

reviews.review_description: I found my ssd drive couldn’t read and sent the team feedback. They replied soon and told me to update the system. It works! Now I can enjoy my movies with ssd again. They are really doing their jobs.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback for us. We are dedicated to offer you the best possible viewing experience on Quest.

reviews.review_title: Video Clarity, Audio Dec and Spatial 👌
reviews.review_description:
Natural video clarity, Spatial Audio, Audio Decoding 👌

Not all quest 3D players play 3D quite right, and not many notice the subtle but detrimental differences, But I do, and 4XVR is simpy SUPERIOR.

Now SOUND!... OHHHHH MYYYYY GOOOODNESSSS... 4XVR is the best at sound decoding. What they do with 7.1 Surround sound Channel and 5.1 Channel, no other player does it like they do, 4XVR  is able pick up sounds other players fail and keep hidden, it is able to beautifully disintergrate and seperate the various ranges successfully without distorting the ranges that tend to fall victim to distortions like the lows(bass)-- it is honestly humbling to hear its audio decording when others have first failed to pull it off successfully. Please NEVER CHANGE THIS.

And Now the Spatial Audio. 🗣🗣 WOOOOW!!!, WOOOOWWW!!!, WOOOOW!!!! No player does it perfectly like 4XVR. This player literally tricks the brain to perfection in making one think they are seated in a payed cinema. Others have failed in this regard, how in the world did you pull it off??.. Please NEVER CHANGE THIS TOO🔥🔥

Movies mean a great deal to me, and 3D movies go up a level in my life. It was money well spent. Thank you 4XVR, through you I got to re-enjoy all the MCU movies of the 2010s just as I remember paying for them all those years ago.😁

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing this.

reviews.review_description: Hands down best media viewer for VR. Especially great for 3D movies. Ripped my entire Blu Ray 3D collection to lossless MKV files and watching them on a massive virtual screen at full quality beats any TV I've ever owned. No other VR media player allows this (as well as ISO file playback). Can't recommend this highly enough. 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
PS: The solution proposed by the developer does not work. Obviously, that was the point of my review. To change the volume at any time of a movie, you have to first wake up the controller and then adjust the volume... every single time —too many steps.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Original review:
I got the premium version. There’s been a bug for a few months now: every time I try to turn down the volume using the glasses button, it shuts the movie off (basically, goes back to menu). 

It seems to happen because the “hand control” is asleep. As a result, every time I want to change the volume, I have to press the trigger with one hand, then touch the glasses with the other (too many steps just to change the volume!). I’ve already tried different options in the settings, but it’s still happening. It was not like this last summer. 

Please allow us to change the volume just by using the glasses button. Thank you.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for reaching out. When you enter video playback for the first time and put down the controller, the program will think the controller is lost. As long as you press any button on the controller again after the video starts playing, you can activate the controller  for recognition and use the volume keys at any time during playing. You can give it a try.
Your suggestion to "adjust the volume directly using the glasses buttons" has been forwarded to our product team. We will carefully evaluate the possibility of implementing this feature in future versions.

reviews.review_description: I really enjoy my 3d Blu-ray movies with this player. But I want to have the 2d to 3d update so that I can enjoy my 2d movies as well in 3d. That would be awesome.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We'll consider adding it in the future.

reviews.review_description:
Love the dlna feature :)  Must buy app !!

Maybe i have a suggestion  to devs : Create a experimental option to convert 2D videos to 3D ... That would be epic :)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We'll consider adding it in the future.

reviews.review_description:
I use this almost exclusively for .iso files since it is the only player for that. In truth if skybox had that option I would use it. The main reason being the theater mode. It doesn't feel anywhere near as immersive as the competition. The other options are ok but the theater needs to feel like a proper theater. Not being able to adjust where you sit front to back is a deal breaker. Adding custom posters is kinda cool but I would rather have an environment that truly tricks my brain. 

Another thing that needs fixed is playing 3d um titles that offer a POV view. It just doesn't scale right. It is impossible to get it looking as good as other options. I think part of it is the player not selecting the best 3d option itself.

developer_response.body: Hi, your feedback is important to us. We are developing more environments and will release in the future. Could you please send us a sample file so that we can explore the 3d um titles that offer a POV view? We'll explore the possibility to support this kind of videos. Thank you for your cooperation. Our email is contact@4xvr.net.

reviews.review_title: Latest update ruined audio for VR videos
reviews.review_description:
The new version for Quest 3 didn't fix the audio for flat and 3D videos. But instead it ruined the audio for VR videos. This is a disaster 🙁
It may be interesting for some videos with talking. But if there's music or asmr or just several sources of sound then the audio is ruined by your "spatial" effect. There should be an option to TURN THIS OFF!!!
Now after the update your player is basically unusable at all. It was unusable for flat and 3D videos before. But at least we could enjoy VR videos in 4xvr. Now it's a complete disaster.
The support in discord can't even say if they add the option to turn it off this year or next year!!!

And about BD3D and MVC. That's great your player can play them. But all movies have multichannel audio. And 4xvr can't play it correctly. It's ruined by their "spatial" effect.
They had a perfect audio playback for 2-channel and multichannel audio before the update. It worked correctly for every type of video except Flat. 
Just needed to apply it to flat videos.
But instead they broke it for all video types :(

I doubt the devs or support even watch movies using their own application

developer_response.body: We'll add the feature to turn off spatial audio on version 2.0. Thank you for your feedback. If you have further questions or suggestions, please feel free to reach out via contact@4xvr.net and we're here to help.

reviews.review_description: Great App that works brilliantly, the cinema environment is excellent

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_title: The best VR player for Quest 3 but...
reviews.review_description:
Exceptional visual quality, superior to any other player.
Supports all types of video and audio formats.
Many other features available.

But...
I give my rating 3/5, because the price is excessively high for offering only an ugly and uncomfortable cinema environment. Does not support multiplayer. No YouTube. No Anchor passthrough. No image format support. 30€ is a fair price when this app offers a more complete app, in which case my rating will become 5/5.

developer_response.body:
Hi, we are developing more environments and will release soon. We'll consider adding multiplayer and Youtube feature in the future.

We are committed to reinvesting all revenue into improving and optimizing the performance of the player to provide you with a better viewing experience. Your support drives us forward, and we will continue to strive to bring you better service and products.

reviews.review_description: How do I watch 3D spatial videos recorded on an iPhone?

developer_response.body: Hi, please check https://www.4xvr.net/en/h-nd-102.html.

reviews.review_title: The best player I have found so far
reviews.review_description:
This is the best player I have found for the Quest 3 so far. It seems to cope with pretty much every file you can throw at it. It also works flawlessly with my network NAS drive. I’m looking forward to when Plex support comes along, in the next release.

There are a couple of things that I think would definitely improve the app though. When it comes to watching a film in a cinema mode, not everybody wants to be seated in a ‘massive’ cinema. I’d much rather the option to have a home cinema environment. Like others have said, maybe something along the lines of the YouTube player. To have better pass through would also be good - one where you can darken the rooms lighting. Maybe even a bit of the screen lighting affecting the ambient lighting in the room. All in all, a great program. Happy with my purchase.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback! We'll consider adding these features in the future.

reviews.review_description: I wait for the cloud drive for too long. When will it come out?

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback. We're actively developing the new version and will release it soon.

reviews.review_title: Awesome in every way except one thing
reviews.review_description:
Great video player! Best quality and greatest support for all formats. Awesome for watching local files from the headset and streaming from the PC with the link app!
One thing I would have liked, that is present in all other players, is the ability to dim the passthrough to make the environment darker when watching that way. That would make it 5 stars for me. Please add this feature. 
Additionally, but not deal breakers, would be nicer UI, something like Skybox's. And having the video light the environment with ambient light from the content, like the YouTube app on the quest.

Update: I have been trying to watch off of usb using OTG and it is not seeing anything. I used the same device on phone and it works. Also link to laptop no longer works. I tried everything I could think of and everything chatgpt suggested and still stuck or connecting or flickering rapidly between connecting and disconnecting.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We'll consider adding the feature in future updates.

reviews.review_description: Please add the image view to this amazing app. 😍

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: I bought the player because I don’t want to waste extra money to multiple players and it’s a very good experience for me.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_title: Love is , best for porn vr
reviews.review_description: Thank you

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: When I got my quest, I wanted to be able to watch my 3D movies in another way and ideally in a fairly realistic cinema environment. This is the best I've seen so far. The way the app picks up the files you send to the headset automatically and plays without issue is great. It's also the only app I've got that actually allows me to fine tune to audio sync with my airpods. Keep up the good work, this thing is the real deal. Would be great to add support for streaming apps and especially YouTube. But for now it's enough to keep me busy 🤘

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: The price is too high

developer_response.body: Hi, please check the Meta creator link online and you will get a coupon for the app. If you have further questions or suggestions, feel free to reach out via contact@4xvr.net.

reviews.review_description: The pt quality is quite good. If they can add the library to the app, it’s gonna be the a killer.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback.

reviews.review_description: Works for my videos

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
I hope your new features for your next update will bring the Ui up off of the floor and into the viewing area. 
And also some nicer environments. 
We really should not have to drag everything around so much either, please consider resizing all of your Ui's. 
Thanks for your reply, as I play movies lying down, the Ui being out of sight make this player  unusable for me. The Ui's are also  only visible in Void, and only after dragging. 
I will stick with MoonVR.

developer_response.body: Hello! We are currently developing new environments, with an update coming soon. When our development resources are in place, we will allocate more efforts to UI optimization. At present, our priority is to improve the playback feature and deliver an enhanced viewing experience.

reviews.review_description: Overall is a well developed app, but few updates. Im intrigued for version2, would it come out soon? Can we know if jellyfin/plex servers would be just video playback or would it handle vustom libraries, movies/tvshows metadata,  cast, etc?

developer_response.body: Hi, we are developing the version 2 and at the very first version, we'll read your libraries and play the videos. We'll keep improving our app to meet your needs.

reviews.review_description:
I love the ambience & colours around the screen & the way it changes your room into those colours too, depending on each scene you're watching in a movie/TV show.

I watch my films via my USB through my Quest 3 as this is the only app that allows me to do this, so buying this was a no brainer in that sense.

But be aware, you need to pay for the full app (22.99), to get full access to all that & use it continuously (like the USB), as you can only watch one USB file for like 20 minutes & access to all the other goodies are EXTREMLY limited too. 

This is one of the reasons for the 3 stars, the other is I'd like to see more FX for the screen added (maybe a few more 'free' ones Devs?), & some more environments like a cosy home cinema, some more general cinema spaces, a home retreat in the mountains & such. 

Then it'll stand out like Bigscreen. 

But it's worth paying for it in my opinion.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback. We're developing more environments in the future.

reviews.review_title: Amazing but also has a dealbreaker
reviews.review_description:
This player is amazing it works great for basically everything.
The ability to read MVC files to play 3D movies without rencoding them is quite unique and is so cool!

However the deal breaker for me is the absence of the possibility to watch movies with friends. I very often watch movies with friends using VLC and i wanted to start doing that in VR but thid is not the player i’ll be doing this on.

Really i’m not asking for the full experience of seeing your friends in the room with you, the only thing i would really need is the ability to sync the playback of a local file that with both have a copy of.
That would be an amazing improvement to make in the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We'll consider adding it in the future.

reviews.review_description: pls add emby support

developer_response.body: Hi, we'll support this feature on 2.0 version. Please stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Frame Sequential  has now been added
reviews.review_description:
I’m very happy to see that Frame Sequential 3D support has come to the app. It worked with no issues. 

Still hoping that the PLEX update comes in the near future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_title: Fundamentally misleading. This is a demo
reviews.review_description: Its a great video player with lots of options but the misleading nature of the agreement leads me to not be able to trust the developer with my money. This is a 30 Day DEMO of a video player. I did not know that when I downloaded it. I thought I was evaluating a player with limited options that I could pay to expand. Mabye I'm wrong or mised a dialogue box along the way?  If this is how they choose to communicate, who knows when they will decide to change the agreement again?

developer_response.body:
Hi, the trial period lasts for 30 days, during which you can explore playing non-3D media files locally. Additionally, we offer a 5-minute-trial of 3D video playback, as well as access to advanced features such as SMB, USB, and more, each day. 

We hope you can have a fully understanding and experience our features and services, helping you make an informed decision about purchasing our product. 

We are committed to reinvesting all revenue into improving and optimizing the performance of the player to provide you with a better viewing experience. Your support drives us forward, and we will continue to strive to bring you better service and products. Thank you for your understanding and support!

If you have further questions or suggestions, please reach out to us via email contact@4xvr.net. We're here to help!

reviews.review_description: Need more backgrounds like moon or mars maybe earth

reviews.review_description:
Frustrating you can’t refer friends because they snuck around that by making the upgrade an add on. 
App itself is mostly fantastic, but I just find it annoying that they do it this way

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your honest feedback! We completely understand your frustration about the friend referral feature, and we truly appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts.

Our goal with the in-app purchase (IAP) model is to make our core features accessible to as many users as possible. This setup allows you to fully explore all our functions before making a purchase decision.

All revenue from IAP is reinvested into optimizing the player’s performance and enhancing the viewing experience. We are constantly working to improve our app, and your support is what drives us forward.

If you have any further questions or suggestions, please feel free to contact us at contact@4xvr.net. We’re always here to help!

reviews.review_description:
Worth the money and a lovely interface for resurrecting those old 3D Blu-ray discs you wanted to forget. So glad now that 4XVR has breathed new life into this.

Incredible depth and so immersive. Watched a relative oldie, Jurassic Park, wow!

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: Pls support emby sooon!

developer_response.body: We're developing new versions and hope to see you soon!

reviews.review_description: This player works great for playing 3D videos from NAS server using smb share. The interface is intuitive and very easy to use. Thanks!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_title: I can’t turn off spatial audio！
reviews.review_description: As the most expensive video player in the store, everything is great except the audio. Yes, the forced spatial audio is awful—tiny, muffled, and with no option to disable it. In some scenes the spatial audio quality is extremely bad, and even Quest system sound settings can’t turn off 4xVR’s spatial audio. Hope the dev team adds a disable option soon.

developer_response.body: Hi, we'll add the feature on Version 2.0. Please stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: At first, I thought it lacked features compared to other players. But after using it daily, I realize its playback tech is on another level. Every other player gives me headaches, unplayable formats, no audio, broken subtitles, you name it. But 4XVR never misses. It just works, flawlessly, every single time. Total beast mode 🤯👌

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: I am currently enjoying an amazing experience within the 30 days trial. But I am not sure I want to pay 30$ while others costs only 5$

reviews.review_description: I tried every video player on Quest but had trouble recognizing my 3d movies on my micro SD card connected to my Quest 3  but found this App to work flawlessly with many video format  and Recommend this video player I was so impressed I bought the full Version and never look else were

reviews.review_description: This app can play the original spatial videos. Nice. Also I want to have a more cozy space or a beach sight. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: With the player, I can enjoy all my Blu-ray files no matter which formats they are.  The price is a little higher but it’s worth the price.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
I thought my brand new Quest 3's lenses were not focused properly, until I installed Bigscreen and ran the same movie and OMG, the image was actually focused and fine detalis were almost all there. So 4X was the culprit...
Image is blurry and seems unfocused and most of the finer detail in the picture and the noise from the original tape, which is there when I play it on my PC, is gone.
It would be a huge benefit if any and all smoothing, noise removal and deblocking filters were optional or turned off by default  and some basic image tuning settings were made available(sharpness).
Otherwise very nice app with easy controls, but I got a Quest 3 to watch movies with cinematic experience. There is no way to do that when the highest quality source available is simply destroyed in the decoding process by the player itself.

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry 4XVR caused blurry issues on your Quest 3. Could you share which movie this happened with? For VR videos, try adjusting IPD in settings. This often helps with focus. If not, send the original video to contact@4xvr.net, and we’ll fix it right away.  

We’ll also consider making smoothing/noise - removal filters optional and adding sharpness settings in future updates. Thanks for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
This is a great way to watch VR 180 from a USB drive plugged directly into your Meta Quest 3 headset.

How do I set the DEFAULT to Fisheyes 180? Everytime I start a video, it shows as FLAT 2D. I have to manually select Fisheyes 180 every.single.time.
Apparantly, the Intelligent Recognition Software isn't recognizing it intelligently enough.

developer_response.body: Hi, please wait for the thumbnails to all display in order for a right recognition. If the thumbnails display has finished but the format is still not right, please check https://www.4xvr.net/en/h-nd-253.html to batch change the video type. If you need further help, please contact us via contact@4xvr.net.

reviews.review_description: I love this app. But unable to turn off spatial audio. On meta setting spatial audio can be turned off for open apps but this app not showing in open apps. In 4xvr setting also audio setting unavailable. Need to turn off spatial audio. But no setting available. I want clear audio. Its kinda irritating not able to turn off spatial audio in whole

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your suggestion. We'll consider adding the feature in future updates.

reviews.review_description: The quality of the image is really better than other video player out there.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your psitive feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Update:
Clearly the best performing app when it comes to streaming videos from LAN shares out of all the apps I've tried and it now has support for passthrough (only reason I didn't switch sooner).
There is literally no reason to use the other apps anymore if you stream content over your network because none of them come close.
No buffering at all even when streaming 8k-60fps high bitrate content, just make sure your WiFi is up for the task ;)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_title: All you need to play 3D Blu-ray Movies
reviews.review_description: Ripped a few of my 3D Blurays uncompressed and have to say this app is pretty awesome and plays them perfectly when converted to iso. Image quality is top notch to. Only tried the trial to see if it worked ok, but will be purchasing the full version. Is there any chance of getting a Personal theatre room with the screen a little further back or altering seat position like Virtual Desktop does? Keep up the good work, you have my support going forward 👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: Au top !

developer_response.body: Merci pour votre évaluation positive!

reviews.review_description: This app can deal with all my videos. Very impressive.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
The quality of the playback of 3D video files, be they MKV or ISO is superb - seriously brighter and sharper than all the RealD cinema screenings I've seen. The only thing better is either 3D Imax or 3D Dolby. Avatar The Way of Water is almost exactly how I remember seeing it in the cinema in London's West End.

The only niggle I have is that some ISO's autoplay on a bonus feature (Boxtrolls goes straight to storyboards, Onwards goes straight to speaker setup) and I can't change which Chapter is playing, even though I go to the option and see the list of all the chapters available. I select something different to what's playing, but it doesn't change. If that worked, then it would be like Mary Poppins - practically perfect in every way.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback. Supporting Blu-ray menu is in our roadmap. Please stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: アップデートはいつですか
reviews.review_description: 早くてお願いします。

developer_response.body: 新しいバージョン開発中です。よろしくお願いします。

reviews.review_description: Slick and clean UI. Works so much better than other Plex frontend apps, and I've tried them all!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_title: Lacks Support for anything over 60 FPS
reviews.review_description: The only thing missing from this app as far as functionality goes is support for 90 and 120 FPS content. Add that and I’ll make this rating a 5 which is what it otherwise is.

developer_response.body: Hi, the video may lag when the resolution is too high, as its decoding performance can’t keep up. 120 FPS playback works smoothly for lower resolutions like 1080P, but 4K content at 120 FPS isn’t supported. Currently, the lag is mainly due to insufficient chip performance, so we’ll likely need to wait for the next-gen Quest to enable this feature.

reviews.review_description: When I was watching a local video, the picture looked pretty clear and the controls were easy to use. The other day I put on Titanic, and lying on the couch with that big screen feeling was really immersive—almost like I was sailing along with them. Time flew by, and it was really enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Works well with USB, but no zoom or ability to change view in 360 videos means it's not a contender for the price.

Update to developer: Skybox VR allows zoom on 360 video, which makes the video much more realistic and panoramic. Also pan you mention doesn't work with 360 videos, it's jittery and then just stops working. Again, for the price, I would expect better usability.

developer_response.body: Hello, currently, we do not provide the Zoom function in 360 videos. However, you can drag the video up, down, left, or right to achieve a change of view. If you have any comments, please feel free to contact us at contact@4xvr.net. Looking forward to your letter.

reviews.review_description: Nice

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
It has to be said that the passthrough video function of 4xvr is really practical! It allows video signals to be presented in the most direct way, retaining the original image quality to the greatest extent while reducing unnecessary delays, bringing an almost native and smooth viewing experience. This is really impressive.

In addition to this excellent passthrough function, 4xvr is definitely the best app for watching videos. What really stands out is its paid version - being able to watch 3D Blu-ray ISO files directly without additional conversion is simply fantastic and super convenient! The user experience is smooth and hassle-free, making it my first choice for watching videos.

My only small wish is that it could add more optional environments. Moreover, it would be even better if there was a passthrough environment that could darken the surrounding area. Even so, with its existing features, it is still top - tier in my mind. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_title: App not have a video up-down function?
reviews.review_description: Hello. I purchased your 4XVR app from the Meta Quest store and am using it on Quest 2. There's one feature I just can't seem to figure out, and if it exists, I can't find it. How do I adjust the up-down orientation while playing a video? (I couldn't find this in the controller or the app; I'm not asking about zooming.) Actually, I think in one of the visuals, one of the two horizontal bars in the app menu showed up-down, but in the version I downloaded from the Meta Store, there's no such bar, though the space seems to be there. It's as if it was there before and then removed. Yes, I found that image; the vertical offset is below the zoom horizontal bar. This line is empty in the app—why is that? We should also be able to do this with the app. This situation seems very strange to me, and I wanted to ask you about it. We need this feature.

developer_response.body:
When you use void and passthrough theatres, you can drag the screen anywhere. But in max theatre, the screen is fixed. We are developing more theatres to meet your needs.

Thank you for your patience and support.

reviews.review_description: Just tried the 4XVR, and the moment I put it on, I was completely immersed. The visuals are clear, the controls feel smooth, and it’s like I’ve stepped into another world right from my couch. Friends keep saying I’m slow to reply, but really, I’m just hanging out somewhere else.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: I recently tried the 4XVR, and overall, the experience was pretty good. The image quality and smoothness were stable, the visuals were clear, and the immersion was quite strong. The virtual environment design was interesting, and the details were well done. If you're into immersive experiences, this device is definitely worth trying.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: I’ve been using the 4XVR to watch local videos lately, and it’s really convenient. I usually put downloaded movies, variety shows, and short clips in it, and once I put on the headset, I can start watching right away—no worrying about internet speed or finding a player. The visuals are clear, and sometimes I even notice small details I hadn’t seen before. The controls are simple too, adjusting volume and skipping ahead feels smooth. Watching while lying on the couch feels much more comfortable than using a tablet or TV, and a few times I’ve completely lost track of time.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: Love the quality of this video player, has a lot of options and features. The cinema environment is great and i love the dynamic lighting. Only thing I feel is missing in a web browser to watch streaming services. Hope that will be added in the near future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: I bought the premium version, how do I share it with my kids profiles?

Last time I watched The Lord of the Rings on the 4XVR, the scenes felt pretty expansive and the details came through nicely. It almost felt like walking along with the Fellowship. The visuals were clear, and the whole experience was quite enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: Can’t believe I went through the trouble of ripping and then converting my 3D Blu-Rays when I could’ve used this. The fact it can play 3D MVC files is a godsend, hopefully they add a way to use iso bluray/dvd menus and special features of the disc.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback. The Blu-ray menu is definitely on our roadmap. Please stay tuned for the upcoming updates.

reviews.review_description: I’m the kind of guy who likes to mess around with new gadgets, and recently I gave the 4XVR a try. Gotta say, it actually fits me pretty well. The moment I put the headset on, it felt like I’d stepped into another world—almost forgot I was still in my living room. The visuals look nice and clear, and the controls are smooth enough that even someone like me, who’s not exactly the most tech-savvy, can enjoy it without a problem. The virtual worlds are fun to explore, and honestly, it’s the kind of thing you don’t feel like taking off once you get into it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: 4XVR is really good! Watching the 3D version of Guardians of the Galaxy, the clarity is amazing—you can even make out the details of Rocket Raccoon's fur. It feels super immersive in VR. The old movies my friend sent, with all sorts of messy formats, are recognized right away when I plug in the USB drive. Streaming from my home NAS over WiFi while on a business trip? No lag at all. Definitely reliable.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!

reviews.review_description: The passthrough video feature of 4XVR is truly stunning! Take the keying effect as an example. Many similar functions on the market often have obvious jagged edges when keying, which seriously affects the visual experience, as if a originally exquisite picture has been roughly cropped and stitched. However, 4XVR performs excellently in this aspect. When the passthrough video function is turned on, whether it is the integration of virtual elements with real scenes or the keying and presentation of the main subject of the video, there are almost no obvious jagged edges. Even the fine details such as the hair of a character can be smoothly and naturally distinguished from the background with a soft transition, as if the virtual and reality should have been perfectly integrated. It greatly enhances the sense of immersion and realism, making every use feel like being in a carefully crafted dreamlike real interactive space.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback!
